channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Nvidia-backed CoreWeave slashes IPO size and price amid investor concerns
item.description: CoreWeave plans to reduce the size of its U.S. initial public offering and price its shares below the indicated range, a person familiar with the matter told Reuters on Thursday, dampening expectations that the listing would boost investor appetite for IPOs.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Why Tesla may be spared from Trump’s auto tariffs
item.description: As the global auto world reeled from the potential fallout of Donald Trump‘s new auto tariffs, one name stood out as less affected than others—electric-vehicle maker Tesla. The Texas-based company’s shares were the rare automotive stock to trade in the green in U.S.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Elon Musk privately pressured Reddit CEO Steve Huffman on content moderation: report
item.description: X owner Elon Musk was privately messaging with Reddit CEO Steve Huffman while also putting public pressure on the social media company’s content moderation efforts, The Verge reported Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: The slim phone era is (finally) back
item.description: Smartphones have been around long enough that, to the casual observer, their designs seem to have hit a plateau. And on a functional level, that’s more or less true—we’re all essentially holding the same six-inch-ish rectangle, aside from the occasional foldable exception.
item.dc:creator: Sam Byford, Fast Company

item.title: An AI pioneer is launching a blockchain-powered marketplace for open-source models and applications
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: The New York Times Wins Ruling in Copyright Lawsuit Against OpenAI and Microsoft
item.description: Federal judge rules The New York Times can proceed with copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft over AI chatbot use of news stories
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: With the rise of genAI, it’s time to follow Apple’s Security Recommendations
item.description: Apple’s Safari browser has a really useful password management feature, which is now also available as a standalone app called Passwords.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: What is 'classified' information? What are 'secure' communications? Here's a primer
item.description: The Trump administration's use of a popular app to discuss sensitive military plans — with a journalist on the text chain — is raising questions about security and the importance of safeguarding the nation's secrets.
item.dc:creator: David Klepper, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: What’s an email mask? Here’s why tech experts say you should be using one
item.description: You’ve heard of burner phones. What about burner email? So much of the internet now requires that you hand over your email address before you’re able to use any services—from an app you’ve downloaded to signing up for a newsletter or redeeming a special offer online.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Senate Republican: Taylor Swift could write song about 'terrible breakup' between Musk, liberals
item.description: Sen. Bernie Moreno (R-Ohio) joked Thursday about the “terrible breakup” between Elon Musk and liberals, as Democrats denounce the tech billionaire’s prominent role in the Trump administration. After Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Figure skating embraces the future with new technology, modern concepts to engage athletes and fans
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Ashley Wagner and Ben Agosto know what it's like to step off the ice at the figure skating world championships and feel as though they've conquered the sport. And what it feels like when the notoriously fickle sport bites back.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Microsoft’s latest Windows 11 update exorcises possessed printers that spewed out pages of random characters
item.description: Windows 11 glitch that made printers seem like they’re possessed is one of the strangest bugs I’ve even known – but it’s been banished now.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Lies of P Overture won't elaborate on the game's eyebrow-raising post-credits twist, and I think that's good news
item.description: I'm actually glad that Lies of P's Overture DLC won't tie into the base game's shocking post-credits twist.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Waze is ditching Google Assistant for Gemini on iOS, and for good reasons
item.description: It's time to say goodbye to Google Assistant on Waze for iOS, though it's sticking around in Waze for Android.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Proton and Vivaldi Partner to Integrate VPN into Desktop Browser
item.description: Europe-based firms Proton and Vivaldi announce partnership, integrating Proton VPN directly into Vivaldi's desktop browser, aiming to strengthen European tech independency from US Big Tech giants and provide users with a better online experience.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: A Venus flytrap wasp? Scientists uncover an ancient insect preserved in amber that snatched its prey
item.description: Scientists have discovered an ancient wasp with a body like a Venus flytrap to seize and snatch its prey.
item.dc:creator: Adithi Ramakrishnan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: US robotics companies push for national strategy, including a central office, to compete with China
item.description: American robotics companies are pushing for a national robotics strategy, including a central government robotics office, to promote the industry at a time that Beijing is making intelligent robots a top national priority.
item.dc:creator: Didi Tang And Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Judge allows newspaper copyright lawsuit against OpenAI to proceed
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal judge has ruled that The New York Times and other newspapers can proceed with a copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft seeking to end the practice of using their stories to train artificial intelligence chatbots. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: The ‘living globe’ that can help drones fly without GPS
item.description: Before the advent of GPS, especially at sea, navigation meant finding your position by looking up at the stars.
item.dc:creator: Alex Pasternack, Fast Company

item.title: White House taps Musk to investigate Signal chat mishap
item.description: The White House has asked Elon Musk and his team at the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) to help investigate how a journalist was included on a Signal chat with national security officials.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, The Hill

item.title: Support for TikTok ban plunged over past 2 years: Poll
item.description: The number of Americans who support banning TikTok has fallen dramatically over the past two years, according to a new poll.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: What you need to know about Go, Rust, and Zig
item.description: Every language has a life cycle. Sometimes it starts with a relatively narrow use case and escapes its container; sometimes it’s intended as a general-purpose language but finds a powerful niche instead.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Next.js Security Update Urged Due to Critical Vulnerability - CyberSecurity News
item.description: Developers and web admins using Next.js framework for building or managing interactive web applications should install a security update to plug a critical vulnerability.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: A European startup scrubs its attempt to launch an orbital rocket on its first test flight
item.description: OSLO, Norway (AP) — A private European aerospace company scrubbed its attempt on Monday to launch the first test flight of its orbital launch vehicle from Norway.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation
